delegatedBy.description:
Continue execution of SR-05 phase. Update CONTEXT.md and SPEC.md with registry gap findings first, then execute all 5 plans.

CRITICAL FINDING: configs.json.governance only has 7/42 agents and 4/112 commands. Need full registry populate.

Add to CONTEXT.md Decision 7: Full Registry Populate - populate configs.json.governance with ALL 42 shipped agents and 112 shipped commands.

Add to SPEC.md Requirement 6: Full registry populate - configs.json.governance contains all 42 shipped agents and 112 shipped commands.

Then execute Wave 1-3 plans.
